leadText: The Barred Cup (Japanese: よこストライプカップ Horizontal Stripe Cup) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Barred Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A cup that's as good for using at home as on a picnic. It's light, sturdy, and stacks well, so it's a cinch to pack up and carry around.
